channel.title: +Branches on आगमे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +Branches on आगमे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: Misc streams
item.description: वैदिक-कर्म-केन्द्रिता pUrvamImAMsaka-s who ignore jNAna-kANDa of vedas and non-vedic texts. Refs: wiki. [AL06, Idx] Likes: their regard for the “eternal” veda-s fits in nicely with viewing them as dharma-manuals for human beings to abide by Rta (the divine order). they reconcile respectability of the smRti-s as being derived from lost veda-s. their arthavAda concept, which reduces the tales the (“eternal”) veda-s spin (and unrealistic injunctions) to praises or condemnation of dhArmika action.
